name: Kedgeree
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Flaked finnan haddie - freshened, boned, skinned (or any smoked fish)
3 cups Cooked basmati rice - (try brown basmati rice)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Place the eggs, fish, and rice in a large mixing bowl; toss together lightly to mix.
3. In a small saucepan, heat the heavy cream with curry powder and nutmeg until spices are blended.
4. Add the heated cream mixture, pepper, and lemon juice to the rice mixture; gently toss.
5. Taste for saltiness and seasoning; adjust as needed (the dish will not need additional salt if the smoked fish is salty).
6. Place Kedgeree in a casserole dish and heat until piping hot.
7. Serve on a platter with softly scrambled eggs, garnished with lime wedges.
